purpose: Lightweight baseline inventory for the 10-round governance workflow before expensive full-repository gates run.

aiflowTasks.title: RPC Tier 1 release-train closeout
aiflowTasks.objective: Promote RPC unary and stream surfaces from candidate and report-only evidence toward Tier 1 release-train readiness without claiming latency parity before trend evidence supports it.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Release-train RPC evidence for unary, server-stream, client-stream, bidi-stream, resolver, balancer, deadline, retry, auth, tracing, benchmark budget status, Kitex rollback path, and promotion blockers.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC release-train evidence and boundary gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Generated project historical fixture matrix
aiflowTasks.objective: Move generator trust from current-profile smoke evidence to historical old, current, and future fixture generation with compile, test, repeat-diff, and explainable-diff evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Historical .api, .proto, config, plugin profile, and generated snapshot fixtures with temporary project generation, go test smoke, repeat generation diff, and diff report evidence.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after historical fixture and generation compatibility gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Reference app Docker-backed live proof
aiflowTasks.objective: Promote production-orders Docker mode from static topology evidence to live integration proof while preserving memory mode as the default fast smoke path.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Reference app evidence for memory mode, Docker-backed SQL outbox, Redis cache, Kafka, RabbitMQ, Redis Stream, Consul, etcd, Nacos, OpenTelemetry collector, fallback reasons, and rollback notes.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after reference app smoke gates pass or explicit environment fallback evidence is recorded

aiflowTasks.title: Gateway and cache benchmark ownership
aiflowTasks.objective: Close gateway proxy and cache hot-path unsupported report-only gaps in the R8 performance depth matrix with benchmark ownership, allocation budgets, and rollback notes.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Gateway proxy and cache hot path benchmark evidence with baseline, current trend, allocation budget, report-only latency status, unsupported-surface handling, and rollback guidance.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after benchmark ownership and regression gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Hosted release CI evidence closure
aiflowTasks.objective: Upgrade local release evidence into hosted tag CI evidence mapping so release artifact gates cannot be skipped silently.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Hosted release CI evidence for artifact upload matrix, SBOM, checksums, provenance, Docker digest, Trivy, CodeQL, Scorecard, Dependency Review, required checks, and release evidence manifest.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after hosted release evidence and required-check drift gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Cloud-native live render validation
aiflowTasks.objective: Move Helm, Kustomize, NetworkPolicy, HPA, PDB, and ServiceMonitor evidence from static fallback toward real tool rendering with explicit fallback reason contracts.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Helm values profiles, rendered golden YAML, optional kubeconform or kubeval report, Kustomize overlays, and explicit static fallback reason schema.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after cloud-native render gates pass or explicit missing-tool fallback evidence is recorded

aiflowTasks.title: Plugin registry publish hardening
aiflowTasks.objective: Promote the plugin registry from conformance examples to a publishable protocol with trust, source, compatibility, digest, permission, and rollback evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Plugin registry publish contract covering compatibility policy, signature trust source, digest pinning, source allowlist, template contract versioning, permission boundaries, malicious paths, and no partial writes.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after plugin registry publish hardening gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Adopter migration proof expansion
aiflowTasks.objective: Expand Gin, go-zero, Kratos, and Kitex migration paths into runnable adopter proof with rollback notes, compatibility caveats, gate commands, and boundary explanations.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Migration proof rows for Gin, go-zero, Kratos, and Kitex with runnable examples, examples smoke, rollback notes, compatibility caveats, performance boundaries, and governance boundary notes.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after adopter migration proof and examples smoke gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: CLI and doctor remediation loop
aiflowTasks.objective: Turn doctor, release check, generated failure report, support bundle, and aiflow handoff data into a remediation loop that tells adopters the next action after failures.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: CLI remediation evidence for gofly doctor --json, gofly release check --json, generated project failure report, support bundle, CLI JSON golden fields, and aiflow handoff nextActions.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after CLI remediation and JSON contract gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: P9 convergence evidence report
aiflowTasks.objective: Close the P9 governance batch by recording traceable task artifacts, gates, commits, known risks, ignored runtime paths, and follow-up ordering without committing runtime state.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Final P9 convergence report with per-task commits, gate evidence, runtime ignored paths, known risks, and next-round recommendations.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after convergence gate passes or environment-limited failures are documented

timeoutPolicy.fallback: Use governance-boundary-inventory-check for Round 01 evidence before running full go test ./...
